registryMode.description: Metric and algorithm configuration is driven by registry metadata and per-metric parameter resolution.

workflow.title: Select Files
workflow.description: Upload actigraphy and optional supporting files.

workflow.title: Map CSV Columns
workflow.description: Assign timestamp, activity, light, temperature, and non-wear columns for CSV uploads.

workflow.title: Preview Activity
workflow.description: Inspect the loaded activity recording before cleaning and analysis.

workflow.title: Preview Light
workflow.description: Inspect light data if present in the recording or separate light file.

workflow.title: Cleaning & Masking
workflow.description: Exclude invalid or non-wear periods before analysis.

workflow.title: Sleep Diary
workflow.description: Attach reported sleep timing and naps if available.

workflow.title: Start / Stop Files
workflow.description: Attach files defining the true effective recording interval.

workflow.title: Algorithms & Analysis Setup
workflow.description: Choose algorithms first, then family-level or metric-level analysis.

uiText.maskingHelp: Masking excludes invalid or non-wear periods so they do not influence analysis.
uiText.diaryHelp: Sleep diary files contain reported sleep timing, naps, or in-bed intervals.
uiText.sstHelp: Start/Stop files define the actual effective recording interval, such as when the device was really worn.
uiText.algorithmHelp: All scoring algorithms return a binary rest/activity time series and should be selected before sleep-family metrics.
